badges.name: First Steps
badges.description: Completed your very first quiz on CodeMerit.
badges.content: Welcome aboard! You just completed your first quiz.

badges.name: Perfect Score
badges.description: Answered every question correctly in a single quiz.
badges.content: Flawless! You scored 100% on a quiz.

badges.name: Subject Master
badges.description: Reached full topic coverage across an entire subject.
badges.content: You've mastered every topic in a subject.

badges.name: 7-Day Streak
badges.content: A full week of consistent practice!

badges.name: 30-Day Streak
badges.content: A whole month without missing a day!

badges.name: Certified Professional
badges.description: Earned your first certification track certificate.
badges.content: Congratulations on earning your first certificate!
